name: Butterscotch Drops
recipeIngredient: 2 cups C & H Brown Sugar; packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Mix the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture; stir in vanilla.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake in a 350°F (175°C) oven for 10 to 12 minutes.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
Makes about 7 dozen crisp cookies.
